mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, profile_image AS profileImage, bio, role, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT id, username, email, password, profile_image AS profileImage, bio, role, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET profile_image = #{profileImage}, bio = #{bio}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
